mapper.sql: id, user_id, title, content, cover_url, video_url, type, tags, duration, view_count, like_count, comment_count, favorite_count, status, create_time, update_time, music_id, subtitle
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO video (user_id, title, content, cover_url, video_url, type, tags, duration, music_id, subtitle) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{coverUrl}, #{videoUrl}, #{type}, #{tags}, #{duration}, #{musicId}, #{subtitle})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM video WHERE user_id=#{userId} AND status=1 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
mapper.update: UPDATE video SET view_count=view_count+1 WHERE id=#{id}
UPDATE video SET comment_count=comment_count+#{delta} WHERE id=#{id}
UPDATE video SET like_count=like_count+#{delta} WHERE id=#{id}
UPDATE video SET favorite_count=favorite_count+#{delta} WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM video WHERE status=1
SELECT id FROM video WHERE status=1 ORDER BY (like_count + view_count) DESC LIMIT 1000
mapper.update: UPDATE video SET status=#{status} WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM video WHERE user_id=#{userId} AND status=#{status} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
